title: Senior Backend Engineer, Payments
content:
Stripe is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Payments Platform team. This is a senior-level role for engineers with 6+ years of experience building large-scale distributed systems.

What you'll do

  • Design and operate high-throughput payment services in Go and Python
  • Own reliability, latency, and correctness of money-movement APIs
  • Work with PostgreSQL, Kafka, and gRPC at scale

Requirements

  • 6+ years of backend engineering experience
  • Strong proficiency in Go and Python
  • Deep experience with distributed systems and databases (PostgreSQL)
  • Experience with API design and idempotency

Nice to have

  • Experience with payments or fintech
  • Kubernetes and infrastructure-as-code

Compensation and location

The salary range for this role is $200,000 - $280,000 USD per year. This position is fully remote within the US, with optional access to our San Francisco, CA and New York, NY offices.
